detail.description:
THRONE OF 3Q – 3D STRATEGY SLG
Chaos erupts across the land, and heroes rise to claim their destiny. My Lord, enter the world of the Three Kingdoms — gather resources, build your city, and begin your path to domination.
At the beginning, you only have 3 villagers and a small settlement. Resources are scarce and the road ahead is difficult. But with your strategy and leadership, even a barren land can grow into a mighty empire.
The world awaits a true ruler. And that ruler is you!
FEATURES
3D CIT
